title: Senior Financial Analyst - CCAvenue - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - CCAvenue - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at CCAvenue are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CCAvenue:
CCAvenue is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
